resources.string: "This will increase your message's character count."
Here are some pictures of %s from your Gallery. Select one to show when they call or message you.
"Here's a picture of %s from your Gallery. You'll see it whenever they call or message you."
Give your chat with %s a personal touch by adding a profile picture to their contact info.
Add a recipient to attach files.
Add a recipient to attach an image or video.
Add a recipient to take a picture or record a video.
Add a recipient to see more sending options.
Number added to Message block list.
"To use Advanced Messaging - turn on Enhanced LTE Services"
Agree to use Chatting+ on PC first.
"Messages' AI filter can automatically block suspicious texts."

"This feature only uses the text messages currently on your phone without uploading or storing them outside of your phone.
All your personal information, including information related to financial transactions, stays on your phone so only you can access it.
You can turn off this feature anytime in Settings."
Please select items to send to Reminder.
All your transactions will be shown here.
Upcoming events and alerts will be shown here.
"Show all your conversations, even the ones you've added to categories."
Show all your conversations except the ones in the Promotions category.
Allow to send location in messages.
Allow %s to access your location information?
Anti-phishing can identify malicious URLs in text messages. This feature requires a network connection, and requires your consent for the service provider to receive the following information:
"This video call can't be completed due to the mobile data limit you've set. Change the data limit in Settings?"
To make video calls, turn on Mobile data, then turn on video call.
To make AT&T video calls, turn on Mobile Data
To make video calls, turn on Video Call
Video call unavailable. Use voice call.
Purchased emoticons can be downloaded again from the emoticon store at any time.
"Couldn't connect to server. Try again later."
"You've allowed %1$s to access some of your photos and videos. %2$sChange%3$s"
"Auto Blocker is on with maximum restrictions. To keep your phone safe, links in messages can't be opened."
"Auto Blocker is on with maximum restrictions. To keep your tablet safe, links in messages can't be opened."
Messages containing one-time passwords (OTPs) will be moved to the Trash after 24 hours. Messages in the Trash are permanently deleted after 30 days.
By turning this feature on, you agree to have your messages processed to identify which ones contain OTPs. Messages are processed only on your phone and no data is shared with Samsung.
Because Trash is turned off, messages containing one-time passwords (OTPs) will be permanently deleted after 24 hours.
"%1$s can't receive video calls at this time. You can try to reach %2$s with a message or voice call."
"%s is using Chatting+ now. You can share photos and videos without resizing them, and use functions such as Read receipts and Recall messages."
"%s is a Chatting+ user. You can share photos and videos without resizing them, and use functions such as Read receipts and Recall messages."
This device can be added to %s.
This device can be added to %s or other apps.
The device can be signed in to your %s.
Pay or send money to the owner of this QR code.
Give your group a name, then pick a profile image to set the look and feel of the group.
Move all your conversations to the Trash?
Move this conversation to the Trash?
Move these messages to the Trash?
Move this message to the Trash?
"Any messages you delete will stay in the Trash for 30 days before they're deleted forever."
All the messages in the Trash will be deleted.
Move this starred message to the Trash?
"It's %s's birthday today! Let them know that you're thinking of them."
"Today's a special day (%s). Send them something?"
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from these contacts.
You will no longer receive calls or messages from anyone in the selected conversations.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from these numbers.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from %s.
Message blocked because it contained a blocked phrase.
To open %s, enable the app in Settings.
Remove this chatbot from My chatbots?
To chat with chatbots, go to Message Settings to turn on Advanced messaging.
"Any chats with this chatbot are subject to %1$s's %2$sTerms and Conditions%3$s."

"The service provider is responsible for this chatbot's behavior, the information it provides, and the legal collection and use of users' personal information. Samsung doesn't collect or use personal information with this chatbot."

SK Telecom Co., Ltd., KT Corp., and LG Uplus Corp. are not parties in mail orders, and the obligations and responsibilities concerning the provision of product information and transactions fall on each seller.
To use this service, your phone number and certain data will be sent to Samsung.
By selecting the check boxes, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to the following terms.
I have read and agree to all of the above.
Using this service may result in data charges.
Please see the Privacy Notice to learn more.

"You hereby acknowledge and agree that:
· The Chatbot Service and any contents provided to you through such service, are being provided to you by %1$s, and not by Samsung. · Your use of Chatbot Service is governed by %1$s's Terms and Conditions, and any information or personal data you provide to %1$s will be subject to %1$s's Privacy Policy. · To the extent permitted under applicable laws, Samsung expressly disclaims any liability in connection with Chatbot Service and its contents, or your use thereof."

"You hereby acknowledge and agree that: · The Chatbot Service and any contents provided to you through such service, are being provided to you by T-Mobile, and not by Samsung. · Your use of Chatbot Service is governed by T-Mobile's Terms and Conditions, and that any information or personal data you provide to T-Mobile will be subject to T-Mobile's Privacy Policy. · Samsung expressly disclaims any liability in connection with Chatbot Service and its contents (or your use thereof), to the extent permitted under applicable law."

"You hereby acknowledge and agree that:
The Chatbot Service and any content provided to you through such services, are hosted by %1$s and provided by third-party chatbot providers. Your use of the Chatbot Service is subject to %1$s's and the third-party chatbot providers' terms and conditions. Any information or personal data you provide will be subject to %1$s's or the chatbot providers' privacy policy. To the extent permitted under applicable laws, Samsung expressly disclaims any liability in connection with the Chatbot Service and its contents, or your use thereof."
Register for Chatting+ to use Chatbots?
To help chatbots find useful local information for you, turn on Location.
Your chatbots will be able to access your phone information when needed.
Tap here to add this chatbot to Contacts. Added chatbots will appear under My chatbots in Contacts.
"Chatbots can help with shopping, planning trips, receiving news, and more. You don't need to download seperate apps - start chatting now."

"Read the terms and conditions for each chatbot before messaging.
Your mobile number is transmitted when you message a chatbot. Text \"STOP\" if you no longer wish to receive messages from a chatbot.
*Data rates may apply"

"Spam refers to unwanted, unsolicited calls or texts that may be sent for commercial purposes or for reasons prohibited by law.
Common examples of spam include calls or texts that are misleading or advertise illicit activities such as illegal gambling or medication sales."

"Phishing is when a person or group posing as a trusted source calls or texts someone in an attempt to trick or pressure them into sharing sensitive personal or financial information.
Common examples of phishing include:"
Calls or texts posing as government agencies (fraudulent summons, fines, etc.), financial institutions (alleged issues with cards, accounts, or payments), family members, or acquaintances
Calls or texts containing unknown links or phone numbers
"Calls or texts posing as delivery companies that request payment or information to send packages you didn't order"
Calls or texts promoting investment opportunities with promises of low risk and high returns
"Broadcast channels turned off. This setting doesn't affect broadcasts received through your phone."
"Broadcast channels turned on. This setting doesn't affect broadcasts received through your phone."
This message looks suspicious. Turn on Intelligent detection in Settings to stop receiving messages like this.
"Malicious message detected. Don't tap links or follow instructions in this chat. To block malicious messages, turn on Block malicious messages in Settings."
Decorate your chat bubble with emojis that match your message.
This link may not be safe. Open it only if you trust its source.
Call cannot be added at this time. You can try to reach out by sending message.
"HD Voice isn't supported by the current network."
Connect to a network to download images
Connect to a network to download this image.
Unable to use %s while Two number mode enabled.
Video calling is currently not available. You can try to reach out by sending a message or a voice call.
You can only send a message with image, video and text to selected recipients.
You can only send a message with image, video and text to selected conversation.
"This person can't join group chats. Only Chatting+ users can join group chats."
"Can't attach file from cloud. Download file and attach directly."
"%s can't be used in Digital legacy mode."
"Can't change to %1$s. %2$s doesn't allow more than %3$d recipients in a group conversation. Remove 1 recipient or keep using %4$s."
"Can't change to %1$s. %2$s doesn't allow more than %3$d recipients in a group conversation. Remove %4$d recipients or keep using %5$s."
"Can't edit text while using Bubble flair. Tap the Bubble flair icon to remove it."
"Can't open page because it isn't using a secure connection."
"Can't go to reference message. It may have been deleted or written before you joined the conversation."
"Can't send message with %1$s during a call on %2$s."
"This type of file can't be sent as a multimedia message."
"Can't send message. Turn off Airplane mode."
"Can't turn on this setting while Auto Blocker is on."
"Can't change to %1$s. %2$s doesn't allow more than %3$d recipients in a group conversation. Remove %4$d recipients or keep using %5$s."
"Can't change to %1$s. %2$s doesn't allow more than %3$d recipients in a group conversation. Remove 1 recipient or keep using %4$s."
Unable to launch application. Unknown error.
Select the conversations you want to add to this category.
Send message with emojis and special characters?

"Emojis and special characters may not be shown correctly when this message is received.
You can send it anyway, or change your input mode to Automatic in Settings."
*To experience the benefits of RCS, all chat participants must be using an app that supports RCS messaging. Some functions are only available in one-on-one chats.
AI-generated reaction stickers and composed messages
Your message history will be transferred.
Take chats to the next level with Google Messages. Enjoy more seamless messaging with RCS users on both Android and iOS,* and boost your chats with:
Upgrade to Google Messages to enhance chats with custom themes and Screen Effects.
Upgrade to Google Messages to safeguard chats with real-time spam detection.
Upgrade to Google Messages to enhance chats with features like typing indicators.
Upgrade to Google Messages to easily add people to existing group chats.
Upgrade to Google Messages for a richer messaging experience with AI-generated reaction stickers and composed messages.
When using the Chatting+ service in the mobile network environment such as LTE / 5G or when you roam overseas, additional charges may apply according to your data subscription plan.
When you roam overseas, a separate roaming rate will be charged.
You can start or stop the service at any time by going to the [Settings > Chat Settings > Chat service management] menu.
If the receiving party does not support chat service, it will be sent by SMS/MMS.
For more information, please visit the website of your carrier or contact the customer service center (114).

"If you turn off Chatting+, you won't be able to chat (one-on-one and group chats), get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files. You can still send text messages when the chat service is off."
"If you turn off Chatting+, you won't be able to use group chat, get confirmation that your messages have been read, or share large files."
Use Chatting+ for one-on-one and group chats and large file transfers with other Chatting+ users.
"Use Chatting+ for one-on-one and group chats and large file transfers with other Chatting+ users. You won't be able to use Chatting+ if you're using call forwarding or dual number services."
Chatting+ is a messenger service for one-on-one and group chats and large file transfers with other Chatting+ users. Register to begin using Chatting+.
You can deregister from Chatting+ in 1 minute.
You can deregister from Chatting+ in %d minutes.
You can register for Chatting+ again in 1 minute.
You can register for Chatting+ again in %d minutes.
Provision of Personal Data to Third Party (For the Samsung Chatbot)
"Don't use your data! Send photos under %d MB for free with Chatting+."
Easily share your location with loved ones without copying the address.
"Sent the wrong message? No problem. You can recall messages you've sent within 5 minutes, or edit and resend them within 15 minutes."
"There's room for everyone! You can chat with up to 100 people in a single chat room."
Make your chats more exciting with stickers from the Chatting+ Emoticon store.
Fed up with spam? Keep those annoying texts out of your inbox by automatically blocking malicious messages and spam with Chatting+.
"Not quite ready to send a reply? You can press and hold a contact's icon to preview new messages without sending a read receipt."
A sticker is worth a thousand words. Express yourself more fully in chats with custom stickers and a wide range of reaction emojis.
Get Chatting+ on your PC to send texts, files, reactions, and more from the comfort of your computer.
Get suggestions for emojis to add to text bubbles to make your messages more expressive.
Share your location in a snap
Let your reactions do the talking
Do even more from your PC
Some recipients only have email addresses saved, not phone numbers. To send to their email addresses, the message will be converted to a multimedia message.
Check out this breakdown of your %1$sblocked messages%2$s.
Choose contact to send a gift
Choose contact to send a message
Turn on Call and message continuity on your %s to send messages.
"These settings don't apply to messages received through your phone."
"Call & text on other devices is turned off in your phone's settings. Turn it on to send a text."
"Turn on Call & text on other devices in Settings to make calls and send messages from this tablet using your phone's number and mobile plan."
Call and text from this tablet
"Can't send a message to %d from this tablet. Use your phone instead."
"Can't send a message to %d from this tablet while it's connected to your phone. Message sent using your tablet’s SIM instead."
Tap here to switch to your %s so you can send chat messages.
Connect to Wi-Fi network, then try again.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Double tap to scroll down screen and view new message.
Apply this look to all of your chat rooms?
Reset this chat room to the default look?
Also delete all conversations with them
Message failed would you like to retry?
Organize your conversations into categories so you can find them easily.
"Restoring data… Some data may not be displayed yet."
Group conversations will be sent as multimedia messages.
Failed to copy to SIM card. Try again?
SIM card is not inserted or cannot store SMS messages.
Unable to save as single message to SIM card.Message too large.
Unable to save toSIM card. Invalid address
"Couldn't select opened conversation because it's no longer unread. You can manage it from the main screen."
"Couldn't set up Chatting+ on PC. Check the installation conditions available at www.chattingplus.co.kr."
"A file's been sent to you. Tap the link below to download it."

"One or more of the included recipients aren't Advanced Messaging capable. Tap OK to create a new group conversation with these recipients.
Note that Advanced Messaging capable contacts are shown with a blue dot icon."
"Some of the selected recipients can't join group chats. Create a new conversation to include them."
"%1$s can't join group chats. You can create a new mass text to send to %2$s and everyone else in this group instead, but only you will receive replies to the mass text."
Enter a password to be used for encryption and decryption.
"This category was created when you gave the chat a custom notification sound. Resetting the chat's notification sound will delete this category."
Customization Service improves your experience by personalizing your content in supported apps and services.

"The data limit you had set for your phone has been reached. To continue your video call, your phone will need to use data. To check your data usage, go to Settings > Data usage.
You can also contact %s with a message or a voice call."
The group chat will be removed from your phone and the Messages app.
The group chat will be moved to the Trash.
The group chat will be removed from your tablet and the Messages app.
Bubble flair livens up your chats
Automatically add emojis to text bubbles based on the content of your message.
Have fun while making your messages more expressive.
"Let us know which emoji suggestions didn't suit your message. Your feedback will help us make the Messages app even better!"
"Can't provide suggestions for this message because it might contain inappropriate content. Try again with different text."
To use all the features available in Samsung Messages, you need to make it your default messaging app.
Delete all the messages in this conversation?
Permanently delete all the messages in the Trash?
All usage data provided to Messages will be deleted and your consent to the Terms and Conditions will be withdrawn.
This app can read Messages settings.
This app can change Messages settings.
Thumb face with a pencil and eraser
Two thumb faces, one with cup

"You've reported this chatbot as inappropriate.
You can also block it so it won't send you any more messages."

"This message has been reported as spam.
If you block this contact, you'll no longer receive any calls or messages from this contact."

"This message has been reported as spam.
If you block this number, you'll no longer receive any calls or messages from this number."
The recipients of the current message and its attachments will be discarded.
The current message and its recipients will be discarded.
The recipients of the current message will be discarded.
"This free service will let you chat one-on-one and in groups with other chat users without using up your text messages. You'll also be able to easily share large files with them through chats."

"This service lets you see when your contacts are available, send files like GIFs and high-res photos, and write longer messages than ever before.
Best of all, Chatting+ messages can be sent using Wi-Fi or mobile data, so you won't use up your monthly text limit."
"Try registering again. If you still can't register, contact Samsung Customer Service."
Remove location data when sharing images?
To send and receive messages in this group chat, you need to switch to the same SIM card that was initially used.
The current message will be discarded.
Anything attached to your current message will be discarded.
The end of the current message may be deleted so that the message can be sent with the new SIM.
The recipients of the current message will be discarded. The end of the message may be deleted so that the message can be sent with the new SIM.
The subject of the current message will be discarded.
The recipients of the current message will be discarded.
No recipients have been selected, so leaving will discard this message.
"No cellular network available. Connect to an available Wi-Fi Network for messaging."
"The file size of the download is different from the file you received. For security, we can't let you download this file."
"Attachments can't be added or removed when editing messages."
Some text in your message was deleted to make room for the reply.
Receiving multimedia messages will temporarily disconnect your device from the mobile network currently in use.
Sending multimedia messages will temporarily disconnect your device from the mobile network currently in use.
"Dismissing useful cards will only remove them from this tab. The original text messages won't be deleted."
"Displaying message history only. Can't send new messages."
Message has expired and will be deleted
You cannot delete the chat room while the image collage bubble is being received. Please try again after receiving is complete.
"Can't delete images while they're being received. Try again later."
You cannot move the chat room to trash while the image collage bubble is being received. Please try again after receiving is complete.
"Can't move images to the Trash while they're being received. Try again later."
Double tap to go to quoted message.
To save these images, you need to download them all in their original resolutions first. This will use mobile data.
To save this image, you need to download it in its origin resolution first. This will use mobile data.
Download attachment on %s first, then try again.
To attach items from %s, install it on your phone.
To attach items from %s, install it on your tablet.
Failed to download attachment from multimedia message. Try again later.
Downloading the file to your main device (%s). It will then be copied to this phone.
Downloading the file to your main device (%s). It will then be copied to this tablet.
Moved to row %1$d column %2$d in hidden items
Started dragging item at row %1$d column %2$d
Item at position %d cannot be dragged.
"View texts as cards, instantly see who's messaging you, and experience a variety of smart services."
No information available for this station.
Connect to a network to continue.
Recipient is already in this conversation.
Touch and hold, then drag to reorder.
To find your current location, turn on Location.
"Start the group chat right away or enter a group name first that'll be shared among the members."

"The crew is all here!
Start messaging right away or set up the group name and picture first."
Unable to find application to perform this action
Something went wrong. Try again later.
Something went wrong. Try again later. (%s)
Failed to retrieve message from %s. Try again?
Group messages cannot be sent to %s. Please remove or edit.
Unable to send message. FDN mode enabled. Add recipients and SMSC number to FDN contacts to send.
File is too large to send. The file size limit is %s MB.
The file is too large to send.
"You won't be able to download this file later."
ICS files will be converted to VCS or VTS format.
Choose what to show in All tab
Choose what to show in your inbox
Transaction information is based on text messages on this phone.
"When you're using Chatting+, the Send button and message bubbles will be blue."
Chatting+ users have blue speech bubbles beside their names.
Send long text messages without any limitations, share full-size images with your friends, and check the delivery status of your messages.

"Send longer text messages and full-sized images, plus check the delivery statuses of the messages you send to your friends.
The message bubbles and SEND button will change color to let you know when you are using the chat feature."

"Use RCS chat to send long messages, share high quality images, and check message delivery statuses.
The color of the Send button and message bubbles in conversation view shows whether you're using RCS chat."
The colour of the message bubble and SEND button will change to let you know you are using chat.
Express yourself and add delightful surprises to chats with emoticons from the Chatting+ OGQ Store.
If chat is not available, messages and multimedia content will be sent via text or multimedia messages, so your conversation will not be interrupted.
If chat is not available, messages, pictures and videos will be sent via text or multimedia messages so your conversation will not be interrupted.
If RCS chat is unavailable, your messages will be sent by SMS or MMS to keep your conversation going.
Send messages via chat and SMS/MMS
Sending messages by RCS chat or SMS/MMS
Start one-on-one and group chats, and share large files such as high quality images with other Chatting+ users.
You can now talk with all your friends in a group chat. Add contacts to a message and chat away.
You can talk with several people simultaneously in a group RCS Chat. Add selected contacts to a conversation and start chatting.
"YouTube's free data streaming event has ended. When you play YouTube videos in a chat, free data from the event will no longer be provided."
Unable to send file. It exceeds maximum file size.
A new message containing media content has been received.
This file is above %d MB and may use data per your rate plan. To modify data warning settings, tap on Settings below or go to Settings > Chat settings > Multimedia limit. Proceed with file transfer?
File received is too large. Download this file when within a Wi-Fi network.
Use Wi-Fi to send or receive files larger than %1$s %2$s.
Add Gallery to work profile to use this option.
Get interactive content including pictures and videos.
You need to send a message before you can send a gift.
You sent a coupon as a gift.
Use Google Messages to get RCS chats with rich, expressive features, end-to-end encryption, and powerful AI. All of your message history will be transferred.
To use Samsung Messages, first make it your default SMS app
Google Messages is now your default messaging app
Unable to open %s. Tap SETTINGS, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions and try again:
Unable to use %s. Tap SETTINGS, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions and try again:

"Your phone number, the sender's phone number, and the content of the messages (including attached files) will be sent to Google and may be sent to your service provider too. The sender's number will be blocked on your phone."

"This group already has %1$d recipients. Having more than %2$d recipients is only possible when new recipients selected are also Advanced Messaging capable.
This contact isn't capable and can't be added."
"Hosted by someone who's not in your contacts."
This invitation will be declined and you will not receive messages from this group chat.
"The host of this chat isn't in your contacts. If you don't want to join the chat, decline the invitation and the group chat will be removed from your phone."
"The host of this chat isn't in your contacts. If you don't want to join the chat, decline the invitation and the group chat will be removed from your tablet."
%1$s has invited you to join their group chat, which will have %2$d participants, including you.
"The host of this chat isn't in your contacts."
"Read receipts aren't available in this chat because some participants can't receive them."
You already have a group named %s with the same people in it. Switching to this group will discard your draft message.
If you leave this chat, it will be listed in your chat history, but neither you nor any of the other members will be able to rejoin it.
"Some of the selected recipients can't join group chats. Your mass text will go to each recipient as a text message and replies will appear in individual conversations with you."
To send a multimedia message in this group conversation, go to Conversation settings, then turn on Group conversation.
To send multimedia messages as group conversations, go to Settings > More settings > Multimedia messages, then turn on Group conversations.

"The mobile data network you are currently using is “%1$s (%2$s).”
When using Chatting+, data usage charges may apply based on the “%3$s (%4$s)” mobile data plan. (https://www.chattingplus.co.kr)"
This message is from an unsaved number. Beware of smishing and phishing.
Use mobile data to automatically download all chat attachments.
If you wish to withdraw your consent afterwards, you can turn it off in the Messages settings.

"
"
1 image and 1 video saved to tablet.
1 image and 1 video saved to your phone.
1 image and %d videos saved to tablet.
%d images and 1 video saved to tablet.
%1$d images and %2$d videos saved to tablet.
%1$d images and %2$d videos saved to your phone.
In order to send a location in a message, your location information will be used by the map from AutoNavi. This feature requires a network connection, and requires the following permissions:
To continue this conversation, add some recipients.
Viewing message history. To send or receive messages, create a new group conversation with these recipients.
Viewing message history. To send or receive messages, create a new group chat with these recipients.
You are now the group leader.
%s has been removed from the group chat.
To send a coupon as a gift, you need to install Samsung Pay.
"To view %s's location, you need to install the Samsung Find app."
To share your location, you need to install the Samsung Find app.
Install Samsung Pay to send gift coupons.
To transfer money, Toss needs to be installed.
"Intelligent detection's AI filter isn't always accurate. Some legitimate messages may be incorrectly flagged as suspicious and blocked."
Save time when texting with message suggestions based on the context of your chat.
International calls cannot be made and international messages cannot be sent in Two number mode.
"Can't send messages to international numbers in Two number mode."
Some recipients have international numbers. Sending this message may result in additional charges.
"This phone number can't receive money transfers."
"Unable to add the recipient. The recipient's number is not valid"
Unable to send message to %s. Invalid number or email.
Unable to add some recipients. Their numbers are not valid
You can now add %s to group chats and share high-quality pictures and videos.
These new features are available to postpaid customers messaging with other Advanced Messaging capable AT&T postpaid contacts.
To use these features, you and the contacts you exchange messages with need to have phones and services that are compatible with Advanced Messaging.
"If you prefer other people not know when you've read their messages, turn Read receipts off in message settings."
Call can\t be added at this time. Try sending a message instead.
"This message isn't shown to the recipient."
Keep malicious messages out of your inbox.

"Your phone number, the sender's phone number, and the contents of the messages (including attached files) will be sent to the Korea Internet & Security Agency's Illegal Spam Response Center. The sender's number will also be blocked on your phone."

"Your phone number, the sender's phone number, and the content of the messages (including attachments) will be sent to National Counter Scam Bureau and Korea Internet & Security Agency. The sent information will be analyzed to help prevent criminal scams and other fraudulent activities. The sender's number will also be blocked on your phone.
Please contact National Counter Scam Bureau for issues such as registering or consulting on telecommunications financial fraud reports."
Using mobile data may result in additional charges. Continue?
New text messages may be received when you open Messages. Receiving text messages while roaming will not result in additional charges.
" 1. 통화 앱에서 *77 + 상대방 전화번호를 입력하고 통화 버튼을 누르세요. (114 안내원이 '고객님께서는 본 서비스에 가입되어있지 않습니다....' 로 알려주면 해당 심은 사용 불가능입니다.)"
" 2. 상대방 단말에서 수신표시되는 전화번호가 투폰 전화번호입니다."
" 3. 해당 투폰 전화번호를 위 \"TwoPhoneNumber\" 입력란에 입력하세요."
" 4. 그리고 아래 투폰 등록 버튼을 누르시면 됩니다."
A new version of the language pack is available. Update it for better audio messages transcription.
Message not scheduled. Tap the Clock icon to schedule when to send the message.
"You'll need to be invited again to rejoin this group chat."
"You'll need to be invited again in order to rejoin the group."
Only a member of the group chat can add you back.
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
To send large files as links, you need to update the Link Sharing app in the Galaxy Store or Play Store.
After you create contacts, contacts will be shown here.
Not all location sources are currently enabled. For faster and more accurate location detection, enable GPS location settings.
To see where you are on the map, change the Locating method to High accuracy.
Advanced Calling is turned off. Would you like to turn it back on?

The URL you just tried to access was detected as a malicious link and automatically blocked to prevent damage. Even if the link is from someone in your contacts, so be careful with any links you receive.
You can send announcement messages to multiple recipients. In this chat room, you can only send messages. You can check any replies to specific messages in 1:1 chat rooms.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Unable to send message. Maximum number of recipients is %d. Delete recipients.
"You won't get any more messages from %s."
You will no longer receive any messages from this chatbot.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from this contact.
You will no longer receive any messages from this contact.
"You will no longer receive any calls or messages from this person. However, you'll still get their messages through your phone unless you block them on that device too."
You will no longer receive any messages from this email address.
"You will no longer receive any messages from this email address. However, you'll still get their messages through your phone unless you block them on that device too."
You will no longer receive any messages from these email addresses.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from this number.
You will no longer receive any messages from this number.
"You will no longer receive any calls or messages from this number. However, you'll still get their messages through your phone unless you block them on that device too."
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from these senders.
"You'll no longer get messages from this chat room."
Touch and hold to choose sticker and emoji provider.
Touch and hold to change the sticker source.
Tap here to review your message.
"%d messages weren't sent. Tap here to review your messages."
Tap here to review your message.
Currently unable to send your message. It will be sent when the service becomes available.
Message sent using other phone number.
"Enter your ideas for new functions, apps, or improvements. The information you provide helps improve our services. Thank you."
Message suggestions help you save time when texting.
Reply to messages faster with suggested responses.
Choose from various options that fit the context of your conversation.

"Message suggestions help you save time when texting.
Reply to messages faster with suggested responses that fit the context of the conversation and can be sent with a tap."
"Can't provide suggestions for this message due to its content. Try again with different text."
Unable to send MMS in GSM area only
Multimedia messages not available in conversations with more than %d recipients.
Mobile Data is turned off. Would you like to turn it back on?
The attachment is in a restricted format. To send media with restricted file types, tap SETTINGS, then change your restriction settings.
The attachment is in a restricted format. To send this attachment, change your restriction settings in the Messages app on %s.
Unable to attach. File not supported
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
When sending multiple attachments or attachments with text, each will go as a separate message.
Unable to send message. %d attachments moved, deleted, or corrupted.
There was a problem connecting. Try again later.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Check your network settings, then try again"
Mobile data is disabled. This message will be sent when mobile data is enabled.
Unable to connect to mobile networks while Flight mode is enabled. This message will be sent when Flight mode is disabled
Data roaming is disabled. This message will be sent when data roaming is enabled or when you leave the roaming area
These new features are available to postpaid customers messaging with other Advanced Messaging capable contacts.
Select new group leader before leaving
Enjoy a powerful messaging service where you can send messages with pictures, audio, video, location information, and more.
Besides traditional one to one chat, you can communicate with group chatting,improve the efficiency of communication.
To use this feature, you need to insert a SIM card and turn on Mobile data.
No apps available to perform this action.
Install an app that can do this action.
No network connection. Check connection and try again.
To attach this item, clear some space on your phone.
All messages already marked as read.
None of your apps can do this action.
Unable to send MMS. Enable mobile data.
"Unable to send/receive MMS messages. Data roaming is disabled. Go to Settings to enable data roaming."
"Couldn't save %s image(s) because the download failed."
You can share with anyone in your contacts who has registered their phone number in Galaxy sharing (Settings > Samsung account > Galaxy sharing).
"Advanced Messaging isn't supported by this SIM card."
"Can't use Chatting+ on PC with an eSIM."
"1. Please pass along the newly created backup file and password with the encryption and decryption. 2. Delete message backup file after it is copied to PC."
"Show when Messages does a foreground sync to keep Android from killing the app. This doesn't affect new message notifications, and keeping this off won't affect when you receive new messages."
"Settings on this screen don't affect chat rooms with custom notification sounds."
Notifications from this category are blocked.
Notifications turned off. Conversations with custom notifications not affected.
Notifications turned on. Conversations with custom notifications not affected.
Dual number service not supported in international roaming area.
Just one more step to get the latest chat features.
Process text on your phone only. Suggestions may be less accurate.
Unable to send message. Attachment moved, deleted, or corrupted.
Unable to send message. 1 attachment moved, deleted, or corrupted.
"One of your images couldn't be downloaded. Try again."
%s can only be used by the owner of the device.
You can send gifts or transfer money to people from in here.
Turn on Auto delete OTP messages to delete one-time passwords after 24 hours.
Check your service provider. Chatting+ on PC is only available for SK Telecom customers.
"This plugin syncs your contacts between your devices so you see people's names in chats instead of just their phone numbers."
To use Chatting+ on your PC, you need to install the Chatting+ on PC plugin on your phone.
Give yourself more room to express your thoughts by typing on a larger screen.
Receiving messages on your PC is completely free. Charges for sending texts depend on your mobile plan.
AI-powered spam detection automatically adds tags to suspicious texts so you can manage them all at once.
"Something went wrong. Couldn't register to use Chatting+ on PC. Try registering in Messages settings > Chatting+ settings > Chatting+ management."
Get texts on your PC for free
"You can still use the app's basic functions without allowing the optional permissions."
The following permissions are optional. You can use the app without them, but some functions may be limited.
Used to let you select recipients from your call history
Used to take pictures and record videos you can attach to messages
Used to search for and show your contacts
Used when you send your location to someone
Used to send and receive text and multimedia messages
Used to attach files to messages and save attachments you receive
Used to let you know when you get new messages
Used to make calls from the Messages app
Used to attach files to messages and save attachments you receive
Used to show the Messages app on top of other apps
Unable to open %s. Tap SETTINGS, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions and try again:
Unable to use %s. Tap SETTINGS, go to App info > Permissions, then allow the following permissions and try again:
This category automatically collects all your mass texts, group chats, and conversations with contacts.
"Can't report message as phishing because it was received on another device."
Download the message before reporting it as phishing.
"Can't report messages as phishing because you're not using a Korean SIM."
"Can't report chat messages as phishing on this phone."
"Can't report chat messages as phishing on this tablet."

For Simple Reporting, only image files, such as jpg, png, gif, and bmp, and m4a and mp4 files can be reported. For files in other formats, please report them to the National Counter Scam Center (https://www.counterscam112.go.kr).
Reporting is not possible because the message size exceeds 5 MB. You can report by accessing the website of the National Counter Scam Center. (https://www.counterscam112.go.kr)
No pictures are available on the phone.
Pinch to zoom in and out of your conversations.
"Can't hide any more items. 4 items required."

"
Sending and receiving data via 3G/LTE networks may result in additional charges depending on your payment plan. Tap OK to continue.
The file you selected is larger than %s. Receiving this file will count toward your data plan limits.
"One or more of the files you've selected is larger than %s. Sending files this large will count toward your data plan limits."
Your image will be sent in high quality. Tap the Image quality button in the bottom right corner of the select screen to change this.
Voice Transcriptions might not be accurate
"Add a nickname that people who don't have you in their Contacts will see in group chats."
"Can't turn Chat messages on or off again for 60 seconds."
Indicates to others that you are typing.
Show information about unknown callers and telemarketers.
"Add a name that people who don't have you in their contacts will see when you chat."
Detect and prevent phishing in text messages.
Allows you to receive CB messages
Show new messages in pop-ups on any screen outside the Messages app, except the lock screen.
Show and allow the subject field to be edited when forwarding multimedia messages.
"Download your messages as soon as they're available."
Send text and multimedia messages to multiple recipients as group conversations so that everyone can see all the responses.
"Download your messages as soon as they're available while roaming."
Automatically retrieve messages. Even if roaming, there are no additional charges.
Show previews of new messages on the lock screen and in pop-ups.
"Choose whether to join group chats hosted by people who aren't in your contacts."
Share larger files, get read receipts and see when someone is replying.
Enable and disable advanced calling and messaging features such as chat, important call indicator, caller ID, video calls, and map sharing.
Chat one-on-one or in groups over Wi-Fi or mobile networks without using text messages.
"Let contacts know when you've read their messages."
"Let contacts see when you've read their messages in a RCS chat."
Show previews of websites when your contacts send links.
Show previews of websites linked in your messages.
Delete your oldest message to make room for each new one you receive after you reach %1$d text or %2$d multimedia.
Delete the oldest message when the maximum number of text messages (%d) has been exceeded.
Delete your oldest messages to make room for new ones after you reach %1$d texts, %2$d multimedia messages, or %3$d chats.
Delete your oldest messages to make room for new ones after you reach %1$d texts, %2$d multimedia messages, or %3$d Chatting+ messages.
Allows links in messages to be opened.
Ask before joining unknown group chats
Senders will be notified when you have read their messages.
Allow others to know when you have read their message.
Show important text messages as cards in a separate tab
%1$s supports %2$s features, so changing your preferred SIM for messages to %3$s will show which of your contacts can use %4$s features.
Preferred SIM for mobile data changed. Chatting+ will now use %1$s. You can no longer send or receive messages in group chats joined while using %2$s.
Your location information will be provided to use the map from %1$s. To continue, read and agree to the %2$s %3$sPrivacy Policy%4$s.
Hide sensitive information, such as verification codes in notifications on your Lock screen.
This chat only includes promotions from %s. You can view all messages from this sender in the All tab.
Ads and promotions will be automatically added to this category.
"This category automatically collects all the ads and promotions you get so they don't take up room in your inbox."
This category automatically collects all the ads and promotions you get.
About to make a call. Continue?
"Push messages turned off. This setting doesn't affect messages received through your phone."
"Push messages turned on. This setting doesn't affect messages received through your phone."
"I'm running late, but I'll be there soon."
Please call me when you get this message.
"Can't talk right now. Send me a message."
I sent this from my phone.

If the verification code has expired, tap RESEND to send a new code
"Allow contacts to see when you've read their messages."
"Link and media previews are hidden because this number isn't in your contacts."
5G messaging is unavailable now. You can currently send text and multimedia messages only.
To use this function. turn on Rich communications.
To use this function, turn on Advanced Messaging.
To add and talk to chatbots, you need to turn on Chatting+.
File is too large. Turn on Advanced Messaging to share large files.
Adding this recipient will remove the attached file.
Removing this recipient will also remove the attached file.
The recipient may still be able to see the message depending on their connection and messaging app.
"Can't record video. Not enough space in attachment."
Add Chatting+ to a new computer
"Check out these %1$sfrequently asked questions%2$s if you're having trouble scanning the code."
On your PC, download and install the %1$s app by doing a web search for %2$s or going to %3$s.
Tap Scan QR code below, then scan the QR code shown in the %s app on your PC.
This device could not be activated. If a new USIM card has been inserted, try restarting your device 2-3 times. If this error persists, please contact a Retail Store or the Customer Service
Failed to authenticate the device. If this problem persists after restarting your device, contact customer services.
"Authentication failed. Contact service center or local dealer"
"Mobile service required. Contact service center or local dealer"
Network error occurred. Emergency calls only
Network error occurred. Emergency calls only
"%s can't receive chat messages right now, so messages will be sent as text or multimedia messages."
Unblock %s and keep them in this conversation?
Double tap and hold, then drag to reorder.
Touch and drag items to rearrange or hide them.
Drag pinned conversations to reorder them. Tap Reset to order conversations by when the last message was sent or received.
"There's an attachment waiting to be sent. Replace it?"
This number will be reported as a spam number and will be added to Spam numbers.
"Tell us why you're reporting this chatbot."
This message will be moved to Blocked messages.

When spam is reported, the contents of the messages (including attached files), the phone number (receiving number) of the complainant, the phone number that sent the messages, etc. are transmitted to the Korea Internet & Security Agency’s Illegal Spam Response Center. The phone number that sent the spam messages is then registered as a spam number, and subsequent messages are blocked. Data charges may apply if you are not connected to WiFi. After submitting your spam report, would you like to block incoming calls/messages by registering this number as a spam number?
Tap here to register for these features.
To share a location, turn on Use precise location in Settings > Permissions > Location.
To use this feature, you need to turn on %s.
To use this feature, you need to allow permission in Settings.
The standard new message notification sound will be used for this conversation. This conversation will no longer support bubble notifications, and any shortcuts to this conversation will be disabled.

"The message will be restored, and we would like to collect the message body that was incorrectly blocked for the purpose of performance improvement.
"
Messages will be restored, and we would like to collect the message body content that was incorrectly blocked for the purpose of performance improvement.
"Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information for collecting the message body "
Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information for collecting the message body content

"Samsung Electronics, Co., Ltd. collects the following personal information when you use our services. You have the right to withhold your consent, and there is no disadvantage even if you do not agree.
"
"1) Type of Information Collected: The message body "
1) Type of Information Collected: Message body content
"2) Purpose of Collection: For the purpose of improving the performance of “Block malicious messages” and “Intelligent detection” services. "

"If you agree to the collection and use of personal information, the message will be restored and the message body will be collected. If you do not agree to the collection and use of personal information, the message will be restored and the message body will not be collected. "

If you agree to the collection and use of personal information, messages will be restored and the message body content will be collected. If you do not agree to the collection and use of personal information, messages will be restored and the message body content will not be collected.
If the message body contains sensitive personal information, do not agree to the above collection and use of personal information.
Unable to complete copying. Some data was not copied.(%1$d copied, %2$d failed)
Send it as a multimedia message instead?

Failed to register location. Some functions will not work in this area (%d)

Number not registered to this service provider (%d)
Number not registered to this service provider (%d)
Number not registered to this service provider (%d)

This message is from a trusted authority verified by KISA.

Touch and hold the Send button to schedule when to send a message.

Message will be sent at %1$s on %2$s.
Message will be sent at %s today.

You can send it as a text message instead using your main device (%s).

Service is not available in this area
"Sending files isn't supported for this conversation."
Double tap to switch to calendar view.
Double tap to switch to Month-Day-Year view.
Double tap to switch to wheel view.
Swipe up or down with two finger to adjust
Set up a profile for this group chat. You can set the group chat name and profile image.
After you reach 1000 blocked messages, your oldest blocked message will be deleted each time a new message is blocked.
Delete the oldest spam message when the maximum number of spam messages (%d) has been exceeded.
Block messages that include specific phrases. Any messages that include a blocked phrase will automatically go to Blocked messages.

In accordance with Article 52 of the “Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection, etc.,” the Korea Internet & Security Agency shall collect and use the following personal information for the purpose of “consultations and handling complaints related to the transmission of advertisement information and Internet advertisements.” The personal information collected in this way shall be stored for 3 years in accordance with the “Rules for Handling Civil Complaints and Reports.”

1) Personal information collected when reporting spam: Mobile phone number of the complainant (receiving number), contents of the messages (including attached files) when reporting message spam, voice recordings of the complainant attached when reporting voice spam, etc.

2) Provision of personal information to third parties: Personal information may be provided to other agencies such as the police, the Central Radio Management Service, Korea Communications Commission, etc. to handle the spam reports, in ways such as investigation requests for illegal spam, taking administrative measures, and blocking
※ If you do not consent to the collection and use of your personal information, you will not be able to use the report feature as spam reports will not be able to be processed.

"Your report through the “Simple Mobile Phone Phishing Reporting Service” will be sent to the Korean National Police Agency, where it will be used to block phishing messages and phone numbers, or to investigate such scams. If necessary, it may also be forwarded to other organizations to support its purpose. The information provided when reporting include: 1) The phone number being reported (reply number) 2) Receiving number, phone number of the person reporting 3) Time of receipt, time of reporting, title, contents of the message (including attached files), call recording file (if attached), and more. For more details, please contact the National Counter Scam Center (1566-1188) or visit its webpage (https://www.counterscam112.go.kr)."

"The ‘Simple Mobile Phone Spam Reporting Service’ is only for reporting illegal mobile phone spam, and cannot be used for any other purposes. Reports are received by the Korea Internet & Security Agency. The information provided when reporting include: 1) Caller’s phone number (number for reply) you are reporting 2) Receiving number, mobile phone number of the person reporting 3) Time of receipt, time of reporting, title, contents of the message (including attached files), etc. The information provided is used for investigation requests for illegal spam, taking administrative measures, blocking, etc. If necessary, this information may be provided to other agencies for these purposes. However, this relevant information will not be provided to other agencies for the purpose of blocking. For more information, please contact the Korea Internet & Security Agency’s Illegal Spam Response Center at 118 (no area code) or visit the homepage (https://spam.kisa.or.kr)."

"Easy report service for mobile spam is only for the report mobile spam, so this must not be used any other purposes. When you report spam, it is received at Korea Spam Response Center(KSRC) of Korea Internet and Security Agency(KISA), and the report includes the items below : sending number, callback number, received time, reported time, title, contents and mobile number of reporter, etc. These items can be used for an investigation, administrative disposition, refusal of reception. According to the case, these can be provided to the proper organizations, but these items shouldn't be provided to any other organizations in the case of refusal of reception. If you want to check the reports, you can find them on the website of KSRC(spam.kisa.or.kr). And if you have any other questions, please call (without prefix number) 118 or access the website. Thank you."
Messages from international senders will be automatically blocked. Some messages from numbers with non-standard country codes may not be blocked.
Consent to collection of personal information

"Messages that Intelligent detection flags as suspicious will be automatically blocked. These may include messages that advertise things like illegal gambling or loans.
You can view blocked messages, and recover any messages that were blocked by mistake, in Messages settings > Block numbers and spam > Blocked messages."
Add an extra layer of protection by blocking messages that our AI filter flags as suspicious.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from this number.
You will no longer receive any calls or messages from these numbers.
Number already added to Message block list.
Numbers ending with %s will be registered as spam numbers
Numbers including %s will be registered as spam numbers
%s will be registered as a spam number
Numbers starting with %s will be registered as spam numbers
Block messages from specific phone numbers.
Unable to add spam number. No number entered.
Words must be at least 4 characters (2 Korean characters)
Words must be at least 4 characters (2 Chinese characters)
Words must be at least %d characters
Stop unwanted messages by blocking the phrases they contain.
Messages that contain %s will be reported as spam
"Block messages that include specific phrases unless they're sent from one of your contacts."
Unable to add spam phrase. No text entered.

"In accordance with Article 2-7 (2) 2, 6, and 7 of the Special Act on the prevention of loss caused by telecommunications-based financial fraud and refund for loss, the Korean National Police Agency collects and uses the following personal information in order to receive and process reports on telecommunications financial fraud, to request suspension of provision of telecommunications services for telephone numbers used in telecommunications financial fraud, and to analyze data on information such as phone numbers and fraudulent accounts used in telecommunications financial fraud and disseminate information to relevant government agencies, and the collected information shall be stored for 10 years.
"

"1) Personal information collected upon report: Mobile phone number of the reporter, text content (including attachments) when reporting via text message, and the recorded voice of the reporter attached when reporting via a call, etc.
2) Provision of personal information to a third party: The personal information may be provided to relevant government agencies, such as Korea Internet & Security Agency and the Financial Supervisory Service, and related institutions, corporations, and organizations to achieve the purpose of collection including request for suspension of provision of telecommunications services to telephone numbers used in telecommunications financial fraud.
※ Reporting will be unavailable and cannot be processed if you do not give your consent to the collection and use personal information."
Messages our AI filter flagged as suspicious.
Messages from blocked numbers or with blocked phrases.
Messages KISA and the police have deemed malicious.
Show quick responses above the text entry field in conversations.
Unable to save template. No text entered.
"Can't save quick response. No text entered."
Block malicious messages and Intelligent detection are turned off. You can turn them on %1$shere%2$s.
Block malicious messages is turned off. You can turn it on %1$shere%2$s.

"This service notifies you by text message when recipients have read or received messages you've sent.
This service will incur additional charges. For more information, search for “Registered SMS messages” at %s."
Share files up to %d MB (each file counts as one message)
Set this phone as your location sharing device
Double tap to go to Samsung Find.
You declined to view their location.
%s stopped sharing their location with you.
%s wants to share their location with you. You can accept their request in the Samsung Find app.
"Can't share your location. Open and set up Samsung Find, then try again."
"Can't share your location. Set up location sharing in %s, then try again."
"Stopped sharing your location from this phone because it's no longer set as your location sharing device in Samsung Find settings."
"Can't share your location because you haven't set this phone as your location sharing device in Samsung Find settings."
To share your location, you need to set this phone as your location sharing device in Samsung Find settings.
"To view %s's location, you need to set this phone as your location sharing device in Samsung Find settings."
Your request to share your location was declined.
Only one person can share their location at a time. You can share your location with %s in Samsung Find.
To share your location, you need to refresh the list of contacts you can share with in Settings.
"Can't share your location with someone who's using the same Samsung account."
"%s hasn't decided whether to view your location."
"Can't share your location with this person because they aren't signed in to their Samsung account."
Double tap to start sharing your location.
Sharing request timed out without a response.
"Can't respond to request because it's expired."
Double tap to stop sharing your location.
"%s won't be able to see your location anymore and will be removed from the People tab in the Samsung Find app."
"%s won't be able to see your location anymore."
"You'll stop sharing your location and you won't be able to view %1$s's location anymore. %2$s will be removed from the People tab in the Samsung Find app."
"You won't be able to view %s's location anymore and they'll be removed from the People tab in the Samsung Find app."
To share your location, you need to turn on Find people you can share with in Settings.
Turn on Find people you can share with
Something went wrong. Try again later.
You shared your phone info with %s.
You shared your tablet info with %s.
You and %s are sharing your locations.
"To view %s's location, you need to sign in to your Samsung account."
To share your location, you need to sign in to your Samsung account.
SIM memory full. Delete some items
"SKT's system is undergoing maintenance. Try again later."
Send high quality photos, videos, and files through text messages.
Send movies, high quality images, and other files with RCS chat.
Unable to receive message. Device memory full. Delete some items
Only text messages can be sent using your virtual number.
To use this feature, you need to allow the %s permission.
To use this feature, you need to allow the %1$s and %2$s permissions.
"Some images couldn't be downloaded. Try again."
Some recent messages look suspicious. Use AI to block unwanted texts.
Choosing a custom notification sound will create a new notification category for this chat.
Choosing a custom notification sound will create a new notification category for this conversation.
This message has already been reported.
This sender was automatically blocked for potentially malicious messages.

When you turn this on, Messages automatically blocks any incoming messages or phone numbers that have been classified as malicious by the Korea Internet & Security Agency or the National Police Agency.
"If a message from a contact contains a link to a malicious website, we'll show you the message and block the link."

"For enhanced protection, use Intelligent detection to block messages that our AI filter flags as suspicious. These may include messages advertising things like illegal gambling or loans.
Intelligent detection isn't always accurate and may sometimes block legitimate messages. You can view blocked messages in Messages settings > Block numbers and spam > Blocked messages."
Messages automatically blocks messages and phone numbers that the Korea Internet & Security Agency and National Police Agency have determined to be malicious.
You can view blocked messages in Messages settings > Block numbers and spam > Blocked messages.
"If messages from your contacts contain links to malicious websites, we'll show you the messages but block the links."
Only malicious messages received after this feature has been turned on will be blocked.
To use Auto block messages, you need to download Spam message filter.
Tap here to turn it on.
The message below was flagged as suspicious and automatically blocked.
The messages below were flagged as suspicious and automatically blocked.
"Can't report message as spam because it was received on another device."
Download the message before reporting it as spam.
"Can't report messages as spam because you're not using a Korean SIM."
"Can't report chat messages as spam on this phone."
"Can't report chat messages as spam on this tablet."

For Simple Reporting, only image files, such as jpg, png, gif, and bmp, and m4a and mp4 files can be reported. For files in other formats, please report them to the Illegal Spam Response Center (https://spam.kisa.or.kr).
The report message cannot exceed 5 Mbyte. If it exceeds this, it can be reported at the Illegal Spam Response Center (https://spam.kisa.or.kr).
Special code(*, #, etc.) in Two phone mode does not recognize. Use after switching mode.
"The crew's all here. Let's start this group chat!"
"The crew's all here. Let's start this group chat!"
To use stickers, switch to Samsung Keyboard.
"Sticker not displayed because it can't be saved."
"Sticker not displayed because it can't be shared."
"Stickers not displayed because they can't be saved."
"Stickers not displayed because they can't be shared."
"Can't use %s. Delete some files or uninstall unused apps, then try again."
"Suggested conversations for '%s'. Select conversations you want to add to this category."
Tap the link to play the video with YouTube.
Only text broadcasts can be sent
Each text and file attachment is counted and charged as a separate message
Please read carefully and agree to the AutoNavi %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Policy%4$s.
Please read carefully and agree to the Tencent %1$sTerms and Conditions%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Policy%4$s.
"Can't send multimedia messages because this group conversation is turned off."
It is failed to block this chatbot
It is failed to remove this chatbot from blocked list
You can now receive messages from this chatbot.
You can now receive messages from this number.
"Can't chat with this chatbot because it's been blocked."
You can now receive calls and messages from this contact.
You can now receive messages from this email address.
You can now receive calls and messages from this number.
Unable to add. Maximum number of attachments (%1$d) reached.
I agree to all the terms above.
You can transfer up to %s won.
This video is too large to send. Trim the video to decrease its resolution and size, then try sending it again.
"Couldn't sign in PC. Try scanning the QR code again."
If you turn off Advanced Messaging, you cannot share files over 1 MB, see read receipts or when the recipient is typing.

"You won't be able to share files over 1 MB, see read receipts, or see when the recipient is typing.
You will also no longer be able to send or receive group messages from your current Advanced Messaging group conversations."
Please wait to disable Advanced Messaging until all file transfers via messaging are done.
Unable to turn off Advanced Messaging
Group conversations off. Only text messages can be sent to multiple recipients, and any replies will be one on one with you.
Group conversations off. Messages to multiple recipients will be sent as mass texts, so replies will be one on one with you.
"Your phone isn't connected to a Wi-Fi network. To use a mobile network instead, turn off Airplane mode in Settings."
Mobile data is disabled. Enable mobile data and try again.
Connect to a Wi-Fi network or turn on Mobile data.
Turn on Mobile data or Wi-Fi to send and receive %s.
To change the notification sound, first turn on notification for this conversation.
Turn your pictures into custom stickers.
You need to switch to One number mode to view this notification.
Unable to switch between Two number and One number modes while Emergency mode enabled.
Unable to change user profile during calls.
"Can't open %s because you're using Power saving with Limit apps and Home screen turned on."
Unable to play sound during call
Unable to play sound during call
Unable to play sound during call
Unable to play video during call.
Unable to send messages while making %d call
"Can't attach file. Maximum attachment size reached."
Unable to copy message to SIM card.
Unable to download. Not enough memory
Unable to open Camera during video calls.
You need to subscribe to the Two number service before you can use Two number mode. Tap OK to subscribe to this service. This may result in additional charges depending on your payment plan.
This message contains recipients both with and without a *77 prefix. It will be sent to all recipients via your original phone number.
"Can't send text messages from second phone number on eSIM while using Twophone service."
Two number mode cannot be used while roaming.
Anyone in the selected conversations will be able to message you again.
Anyone in the selected conversations will be able to call and message you again.
Anyone in the selected conversations will be able to call or message you again
%s will be able to message you again.
%s will be able to call and message you again.
You can now receive calls and messages from all previously blocked numbers.
You can now receive calls and messages from these contacts.
You can now receive messages from these email addresses.
You can now receive calls and messages from these numbers.
You can now receive calls and messages from these senders.
You can now receive calls and messages from this contact.
You can now receive messages from this email address.
You can now receive calls and messages from this number.
"Only show conversations you haven't added to categories."

Following unknown links leaves your device and personal data vulnerable. By tapping OK, you agree that you are solely responsible for any damage to your device or loss of data that may result from following this link.
"Can't view %1$s's location because this version of Samsung Messages doesn't support location sharing. You can view %2$s's location in %3$s."
To send a coupon as a gift, you need to update %s.
To transfer money, %s needs to be updated.
Use AI to block suspicious messages.
Use mobile data to download card templates and conversation avatars.
Use mobile data to download interactive content.
Here you can find important text messages in a simple format and quickly take relevant action.
Useful Cards has been updated to the latest version. Now you can also view your financial transactions here.
"Some of %s's features need to use network connections to work normally. Allow?"
Allow Messages and Messaging Extension to use network connections?
To make video calls, Data roaming access needs to be turned on.
Video calling is not available. You will now be connected through a voice call.
Video Calling is turned off. Would you like to turn it back on?
Only 1 video can be attached to each message.
Your video has a resolution higher than %s. Choose whether to resize it below.
Your video is larger than %s and has a resolution higher than 480p. Resize the video to send it.
Your video is larger than %s and has a resolution higher than 480p. Choose whether to resize it below.
Your video is larger than %s. Resize the video to send it.
"Can't save audio message. Recording time too short."
Maximum audio message length (%s) reached. Audio message saved and attached.
Maximum audio message size reached. Audio message saved and attached.
Touch and hold to record audio message.
Double tap and hold to record voice message.
"Can't start new recording. Already recording with another app."
Recording saved. To send it later, tap the + icon, the select Audio.
"Can't send sound & shot files as multimedia messages. Only picture will be attached."
You have already left this chat and it has been closed.
"Can't open Gallery or Camera. Only Phone and Messages apps usable in Reserve battery mode."
Unable to open %s. Only apps added to home screen can be used in Maximum power saving mode.
Showing previews of web links will use mobile data. Avoid any links that may seem suspicious. You can turn Web previews off in Settings.
This website is safe to visit.
This message contains an unknown web address. Be careful.
"This website could be a threat. We recommend you don't visit it."
You already have a group chat with selected people.
You can set Messages to automatically block malicious messages and phone numbers.
You can set Messages to automatically block suspicious texts.
"You can use Messages' AI filter to automatically block suspicious texts."
You deleted or left this group chat from your main device (%s).
The latest version is already installed.
"Your mobile plan doesn't support Chatting+ on PC."
"Your mobile plan doesn't support Chatting+ on PC. You can use this service after changing your plan."
Get maximum protection from suspicious messages.

"Watch YouTube videos in one-on-one and group chats without using data from 08/19/2019 to 12/31/2019. “Free video data” will be shown on free videos during this event period.
Go to Samsung Members to find out more about this event."
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
